message:
fix(promise): correct unhandled-rejection tracking when .then() lacks onRejected

A .then(onFulfilled, null) call was incorrectly marking rejections as
handled in two paths: (1) during reject(), a reaction with kind==Reject
but handler==None counted as a reject handler, and (2) when .then() was
called on an already-rejected promise, absence of on_rejected was not
checked before setting rejection_handled=true.

Both paths now require an actual onRejected handler to suppress the
unhandled-rejection signal. Four new tests cover pre-reject and
post-reject paths verifying .then(fn, null) leaves rejections unhandled
while .then(null, fn) correctly marks them handled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
